creator: jay.krell@cornell.edu
text:
Multiple times I selected to install documentation from 3.3 /stand/sysinstall, and it always told me it couldn't because something like "lynx not in index".

Fix: 

workarounds: use man pages instead..get a net connection and browse the online copy, buy the Lehey book
How-To-Repeat: Clean install of 3.3, attempt to install "documentation", I don't remember where the option is.
